title: BotanyCompat
description: This Datapack Aims to add compatibility with Botanypots and mods that don't have compatibility
body:
This Datapack Aims to add compatibility with mods that don't have compatibility with Botany Pots Currently, 
We support 

Cobblemon

GravelMon 

Garnished 

Floralis 

Doggy Talents Next

More mods will supported in the future! If you have any suggestions for mods add them to the issue tracker on github!
